headquarters: New York, New York, United States
name: Assurant, Inc.
summary: Assurant, Inc. is a global provider of lifestyle and housing solutions that support, protect, and advance consumers' lives. The company operates through two main segments: Assurant Protection and Assurant Housing. Assurant Protection offers extended service contracts, device protection, and related services for mobile devices, vehicles, and other consumer products. Assurant Housing provides property and casualty insurance, as well as other related services, to mortgage lenders and property owners.
